title: Somali World Cup Referee Denied Entry to U.S. Returns Home to Hero’s Welcome
summary_full: Omar Abdulkadir Artan, who is widely admired in his home country, would have been the first Somali to referee a World Cup game.
summary_public: Omar Abdulkadir Artan, who is widely admired in his home country, would have been the first Somali to referee a World Cup game.
